hero.name: Somraj
hero.title: AI Product Manager
hero.valueProposition: I build AI-native products at scale — from LLM personalization engines to agentic systems — bridging deep technical execution with measurable business outcomes.

about.intro: I'm an AI Product Manager who operates at the intersection of product strategy, machine learning systems, and data-driven growth. I've shipped LLM-powered personalization engines, owned full product lifecycles end-to-end — from discovery to deployment — and built agentic tooling that replaces entire manual workflows. My edge: I can write PRDs and API contracts in the morning, run multivariate experiments by afternoon, and review LLM eval frameworks by evening.
about.philosophy: AI is not a feature layer — it's a new product paradigm. The best AI products are built by PMs who can reason about model behavior, design feedback loops, and define what 'good' looks like for a non-deterministic system. I bring that lens to every roadmap I own.

aiExposure.title: AI & Agentic Product Work
aiExposure.description: Hands-on shipping — not just strategy. From LLM pipelines to autonomous agents deployed in production.

useCases.title: CTMP AI Personalization Engine
useCases.description: Architected a survey-driven, LLM-assisted personalization system that maps user skin concerns to product routines at scale. Delivered +15% add-to-cart and -18% bounce rate across 10M+ monthly users.

useCases.title: AI-Powered Autonomous Audit Agent
useCases.description: Designed and deployed a headless browser agent using LLMs to autonomously crawl UI structures and generate heuristic UX audit reports — replacing 2-week manual processes with 48-hour turnarounds.

useCases.title: GPT-Integrated Project Tracker
useCases.description: Built a full-stack project management platform with GPT-powered task summarization and status workflows. Implemented JWT auth, API monitoring, and observability — production-ready from day one.

projects.title: CTMP AI Personalization Engine
projects.tagline: LLM · Rule Engine · Next.js · REST APIs
projects.problem: Users arrived at a D2C skincare platform with varied, complex skin concerns and received generic, non-personalized experiences — leading to high bounce rates and low add-to-cart.
projects.approach: Designed end-to-end architecture: a survey-driven concern intake layer, an LLM content generation pipeline for routine copy, and a rule-based product matching engine. Built for modular scalability so new concern categories can be added without re-architecture.
projects.impact: +15% add-to-cart rate, +11% PDP engagement, -18% bounce rate. Operating at 10M+ monthly user scale.

projects.title: Homepage & PLP Revamp
projects.tagline: Figma · GA4 · Clarity · Agile · Core Web Vitals
projects.problem: Homepage and PLP suffered from UX friction identified through heatmap analysis and Core Web Vitals data — causing measurable funnel drop-offs and slow page performance.
projects.approach: Owned full product lifecycle: discovery via heatmaps and funnel data, spec writing, UX redesign in Figma, front-end review, and multivariate testing across 3 agile sprints.
projects.impact: +7% conversion rate, +9% average order value, 22% faster page load.

projects.title: AI Project Tracker
projects.problem: Teams lacked a unified task management system with intelligent summarization and built-in observability for distributed workflows.
projects.approach: Built a full-stack PM platform from scratch: GPT-powered task summarization, status workflows, JWT authentication, analytics dashboards, and API monitoring — leveraging OpenAI API for contextual task insights.
projects.impact: Production-deployed platform with full observability. Demonstrated end-to-end technical PM capability — from architecture to deployment.

services.title: AI Product Strategy & Execution
services.description: End-to-end AI product work — from defining LLM evaluation frameworks and writing AI-specific PRDs, to shipping agentic workflows in production.

services.title: 0-to-1 Product Incubation
services.description: Whitespace discovery to MVP. Translating raw market gaps into scalable system architectures with clear go-to-market paths.

services.title: Growth & Experimentation Systems
services.description: Building rigorous A/B and multivariate testing frameworks that systematically lift conversion, retention, and activation metrics at scale.

experience.company: Honasa Consumer Ltd — Mamaearth & The Derma Co.
experience.context: Consumer tech at 10M+ monthly users. Owned AI product strategy, platform reliability, and growth experimentation.
impact: Architected CTMP AI personalization engine: LLM-assisted, survey-driven concern-to-routine mapping system — delivering +15% add-to-cart and -18% bounce rate across 10M+ monthly sessions.
Owned quarterly product roadmap  using OKR methodology; prioritized features via funnel analytics, cohort analysis, and event-tracking data from Amplitude and GA4.
Led homepage & PLP revamp end-to-end — heatmap discovery, Figma specs, front-end review, multivariate testing — achieving +7% CR and +9% AOV across 3 agile sprints.
Governed platform reliability at flash-sale scale (10M+ sessions): CI/CD pipelines, feature flags, release checklists — 99.9% uptime, +25% deploy velocity.
Drove mobile-first strategy: redesigned onboarding flows, deep linking, and push notification logic — growing app session share from 34% to 48%.
Wrote detailed PRDs, system flow diagrams, and API contracts; led UAT cycles and sprint planning across engineering and design squads.

experience.company: Honasa Consumer Ltd — Mamaearth & The Derma Co.
experience.context: Embedded in the core growth pod during rapid D2C scaling phase.
impact: Stabilized checkout and order flows for 15,000+ concurrent users during high-traffic flash sales.
Ran 12+ A/B and multivariate experiments on UI flows; 4 shipped tests delivered sustained 3–5% CR uplift.
Reduced defect resolution time by 28% through structured bug triaging, test case creation, and cross-team release coordination.
Built behavioral analytics dashboards tracking NPS, funnel drop-offs, and KPIs using heatmaps, session replays, and SQL.
